overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter video game showing the interior of 'The Three Broomsticks' tavern. The scene features a dimly lit medieval-style wooden interior with warm fireplace and candlelight, where the player character stands observing the environment with NPCs visible on an upper balcony and seated at tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern interior with upper balcony and fireplace

events.description: interaction prompt icon briefly appears at bottom center of screen indicating possible player action

agents.ego_description: standing still in the tavern entrance area, facing toward the fireplace and upper balcony

notable_agents.action: NPC standing on the upper balcony near the railing, looking down at the tavern floor
NPCs seated at the table near the fireplace, engaged in conversation

entered.detail: wooden sign with carved lettering reading 'THE THREE BROOMSTICKS' mounted on the upper balcony beam
wooden balustrade on the upper floor overlooking the main tavern area
large stone archway leading to a lit fireplace in the back of the tavern
medieval-style wall-mounted lanterns providing warm illumination
rustic wooden dining tables and bench seating typical of a medieval tavern
several framed pictures hanging on the wooden wall to the right
circular iron wheel chandelier hanging from the ceiling beams

segments.scene_description: The player character stands in the entrance of The Three Broomsticks tavern, a cozy medieval establishment with dark wooden beams and warm lighting from wall sconces and a distant fireplace. An NPC stands on the upper balcony overlooking the room while others sit at tables near the fire. The scene is static with minimal movement, maintaining a steady atmospheric view of the detailed game environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric perspective within the cozy, dimly lit interior of The Three Broomsticks tavern. It begins at the entrance of the medieval establishment, where the camera captures the warmth of wall sconces and a distant fireplace reflecting off dark wooden beams. As the view settles, the focus expands to encompass the depth of the room, revealing NPCs seated at tables near the hearth. The scene finally lingers on the architectural detail of the space, highlighting a figure standing on the upper balcony overlooking the quiet activity below.
